title: Analysis code and derived data for: TP53 mutation is associated with selective upregulation of LAG3 independent of immune infiltration and antigen-presentation signatures in WHO grade 4 glioma
description:
Analysis code and derived data accompanying the manuscript "TP53 mutation is associated with selective upregulation of LAG3 independent of immune infiltration and antigen-presentation signatures in WHO grade 4 glioma" (Neuro-Oncology Advances, Ms. No. NOA-D-26-00229R1).

Restricted data. GLASS per-sample derived values are governed by the GLASS consortium conditions-for-use (Synapse syn17038081) and are not redistributed here. The shipped GLASS CSVs retain only sample identifiers (case_barcode / pair_id) plus a pointer to the derivation script; see DATA_ACCESS_GLASS.md for the full regeneration procedure. TCGA, CPTAC and HCMI data are obtained from their respective public portals as described in README.md.

Version history

  • v1.3 — Remove internal audit artifacts from results/; add .zenodo.json
  • v1.2 — Fix GLASS redaction pointers (English text, resolvable script paths)
  • v1.1 — Apply GLASS redaction (Option 2: identifiers + reference pointers)
  • v1.0.0 — Initial release
